## Description

Describe your changes here. Include context, tickets, or references.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests passed (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Docker builds (`docker compose build`)
- [ ] Migrations verified
- [ ] Seeds verified (`npm run seed`)
- [ ] Backward compatible
- [ ] API unchanged (no breaking contracts)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Screenshots attached (if UI changed)

## Risk Assessment

- Does this require a downtime deployment? (Yes/No)
